Issues: Lack of commercial originality: The image is a very basic, generic anatomical drawing. While the drawing itself is not copyrightable, it lacks the unique artistic vision or complexity required to command high commercial value in a competitive market.
Low aesthetic appeal for high-end sales: The style is extremely simple. It is suitable only for very basic educational use, not for high-demand art prints or complex graphic design applications.
Generic nature: There is nothing unique about the composition or technique that would distinguish it from millions of other simple anatomy drawings available online.
